title: Skill4Econ Method Recommendation Output
description: Constrains method-selection rubric outputs for applied economists. It supports scholarly_depth but does not imply estimator success, causal proof, structural recovery, legal authority, audit readiness, or backend certification. Use claim_gate.json for claims; diagnostic_success is not paper-ready evidence; parser-only, interface-only, or missing_dependency is not a backend pass; official/latest sources are needed for volatile facts; unsupported fallback estimators are not equivalent substitutes.

skill_name.description: Skill or rubric name that produced the recommendation.

user_question_summary.description: Concise statement of the user's question and empirical target, preserving unresolved assumptions.

research_domain.description: Applied domain, such as environmental economics, climate economics, energy economics, finance economics, or a user-specific domain.

method_recommendation.description: Recommendation bundle that separates candidate estimators, diagnostic-only procedures, blocked methods, required diagnostics, and next spec drafts without bypassing claim_gate.json.

method_array.description: Candidate methods conditional on data structure, assumptions, diagnostics, and claim gating; inclusion is not endorsement.

method_candidate.description: Candidate empirical method with conditions needed before interpretation; unsupported fallback estimators are not equivalent substitutes.

required_conditions.description: Assumptions, data requirements, timing requirements, and implementation requirements that must hold before stronger interpretation.

diagnostic_only_array.description: Diagnostics, balance checks, falsification checks, data-quality checks, or sensitivity analyses; diagnostic_only must distinguish diagnostics from claim-ready methods.

not_claim_ready_reason.description: Why diagnostic_success alone is not sufficient for causal, structural, audit-grade, legal, or paper-ready claims.

blocked_method_array.description: Methods that should be blocked, deferred, or explicitly not recommended in the current setting.

blocked_reason.description: Econometric or implementation reason this method is not recommended, equivalent, or claim-ready.

forbidden_substitute_claim.description: Optional guardrail text; unsupported fallback estimators are not equivalent substitutes.

diagnostic_array.description: Diagnostics required before interpretation; they do not replace identification assumptions or claim_gate.json.

success_caution.description: Reminder that diagnostic_success is not paper-ready evidence by itself.

spec_draft_array.description: Follow-up spec files or actions; next_spec_drafts names follow-up spec files/actions and does not mean they have run or passed.

claim_gate_needed.description: Whether later claims from this draft must pass claim_gate.json.

research_brief_summary.description: Optional upstream brief summary used for method selection; it is not validated data or certified identification.

claim_language.description: Allowed and avoided wording; strong causal, structural, legal, audit-grade, backend-certified, or paper-ready claims require evidence and claim_gate.json.

claim_status.description: Current evidentiary status of the recommendation.

scholarly_depth.description: Depth of methodological discussion; more depth does not waive diagnostics, official/latest sourcing, or claim_gate.json.
